Container.Name: listarr
Container.Overview: Listarr is a self-hosted web application that automates discovery and bulk import of movies and TV shows from TMDB into Radarr and Sonarr. Configure scheduled lists based on genres, keywords, or popular/trending content and let Listarr handle the imports automatically.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Listarr web interface.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Stores the database, encryption key, and generated config. Must be a persistent path.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Server timezone used for cron schedule interpretation. Example: Europe/London, America/New_York.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Python logging verbosity. INFO is recommended for normal use.

Config.Name: Secret Key Override
Config.Description: Optional: override the auto-generated Flask secret key. Leave blank to use the auto-generated key stored in the instance directory.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true when Listarr is served behind an HTTPS reverse proxy. Enables the Secure flag on session cookies.

Config.Name: Flask Debug
Config.Description: Enable Flask debug mode. Never enable in production.
